build.stdout:
rm -rf main main.o kernels.o DCT8x8_gold.o

nvcc  -std=c++17 -Xcompiler -Wall -arch=sm_89 -O3 -c main.cu -o main.o
nvcc  -std=c++17 -Xcompiler -Wall -arch=sm_89 -O3 -c kernels.cu -o kernels.o
nvcc  -std=c++17 -Xcompiler -Wall -arch=sm_89 -O3 -c DCT8x8_gold.cu -o DCT8x8_gold.o
nvcc  -std=c++17 -Xcompiler -Wall -arch=sm_89 -O3 main.o kernels.o DCT8x8_gold.o -o main
